name: librelink-mcp-server

overridesComment: @modelcontextprotocol/sdk pins @hono/node-server ^1.19.9, but the serve-static path traversal (GHSA-frvp-7c67-39w9) is only fixed in 2.0.5+. Safe across the major: the SDK's only import is getRequestListener, still exported in 2.x. Drop this override once the SDK allows 2.x.
